basic_details.job_title: NITTTR Bhopal Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technical Teachers Training and Research Bhopal (NITTTR Bhopal)
basic_details.post_name: Professor, Associate Professor, Script Writer, Jr. Stenographer, Production Manager, AC Technician, Hostel Caretaker, Multi-Skill Attendant
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technical Teachers Training and Research Bhopal (NITTTR Bhopal) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitttrbpl.ac.in. A total of 22 vacancies have been announced through the NITTTR Bhopal Recruitment 2026 for Professor, Associate Professor, Script Writer, Jr. Stenographer, Production Manager, AC Technician, Hostel Caretaker, and Multi-Skill Attendant posts.

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 1000/- (Pay Level 6 & above) / Rs. 750/- (Pay Level 5 & below)

age_limit.age_limit: As per GoI norms, as applicable. Additional relaxation for persons engaged and having service at NITTTR Bhopal as per BoG decision.
age_limit.details: All Posts: As per GoI norms, as applicable. Additional relaxation for persons engaged and having service at NITTTR Bhopal as per BoG decision.

qualification.education_qualification: As per AICTE Gazette Notification dated 1st March 2019 and subsequent modifications (Teaching), As per details provided on the Institute Website (Non-Teaching)
qualification.details: Professor: As per AICTE norms Associate Professor: As per AICTE norms Script Writer: A. Degree in any discipline with a Certificate in Script Writing/Screen Play Writing from any Government recognized institute/national-level institute or Diploma in Script Writing from any recognized institute. OR B. Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Master's Degree in Science/Electronics Media or Master’s Degree in Business Administration or MBA Mass Communication with a PG Certificate course in script writing/creative writing. OR C. Master's degree in Arts with a Diploma in Journalism or Mass Communication with script writing experience for Door-Darshan, TV Channel programmers for a minimum of ten years. Jr. Stenographer: A. Should have at least second class bachelor’s degree from recognized university. B. Should have a speed in English shorthand of 80 w.p.m. and 40 w.p.m.of English Typewriting and 60 w.p.m.in Hindi and 35 w.p.m.in Hindi on Manual, electronic typewriter and computer of 40 w.p.m. C. Working experience of on English MS Office, Windows, Excel software on Computer. D. 2 years working experience in an office/educational institution. Production Manager: A. Degree in any discipline with diploma in Direction from a recognized Institution. OR B. Degree in any discipline with Diploma in film making & direction from any reputed Institution OR C. Bachelor’s Degree in science subjects/Communication & Journalism, Master’s Degree in any discipline with work management experiences of camera, lighting, direction, audio recording, music composition, editing etc. AC Technician: A. Should possess a Diploma in Mechanical Engineering with three years experience in Air Conditioning and refrigerator Maintenance or An ITI Certificate in any Mechanical Trade with 10 years of experience in Air Conditioning and refrigeration Maintenance, particularly with regard to central and window/split Air Conditioner Maintenance. B. Must possess other skills and experience like helping in setting up experiment in Air Conditioning and Refrigeration apparatus and in Engineering Laboratories. Hostel Caretaker: Should have passed Higher Secondary or equivalent examination from a recognized Board/Institution. Multi-Skill Attendant: QualificationHigh School Certificate Exam Pass. ExperienceOne year of working experience in a Govt. Office or Laboratory or Academic Organization

vacancy_details.Post Name: Professor (Psychology/ Physical Education and Sports/ Psychiatry/ Social Work/ Sociology)

salary_details.salary_range: Pay Levels 1 to 14 as per 7th CPC
salary_details.details: Professor (Computer Science & Engineering): Level 14 (7th CPC) Professor (Psychology/ Physical Education and Sports/ Psychiatry/ Social Work/ Sociology): Level 14 (7th CPC) Professor (Electrical & Electronics): Level 14 (7th CPC) Professor (Education Technology): Level 14 (7th CPC) Professor (Mathematics): Level 14 (7th CPC) Professor (Civil Engineering): Level 14 (7th CPC) Professor (Mechanical Engineering): Level 14 (7th CPC) Professor (Management): Level 14 (7th CPC) Associate Professor (Electronics): Level 13 A1 (7th CPC) Associate Professor (Computer Science & Engineering): Level 13 A1 (7th CPC) Script Writer: Level 10 (7th CPC) Jr. Stenographer: Level 4 (7th CPC) Production Manager: Level 12 (7th CPC) AC Technician: Level 5 (7th CPC) Hostel Caretaker: Level 2 (7th CPC) Multi-Skill Attendant: Level 1 (7th CPC)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualifications and experience Written Test / Skill Test / Trade Test / Interview (post-specific) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NITTTR Bhopal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NITTTR Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NITTTR Bhopal Recruitment 2026 is 25th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NITTTR Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 22 vacancies are available for various posts including Professor, Associate Professor, Script Writer, Jr. Stenographer, Production Manager, AC Technician, Hostel Caretaker, and Multi-Skill Attendant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: For General and OBC category candidates, the application fee is Rs. 1000/- for Pay Level 6 & above posts and Rs. 750/- for Pay Level 5 & below posts.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any application fee exemptions?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the teaching posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification for teaching posts is as per AICTE norms, specifically referencing the AICTE Gazette Notification dated 1st March 2019 and its subsequent modifications.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I find the detailed eligibility criteria for non-teaching posts?
faq.answer: For non-teaching posts, the eligibility criteria are as per the details provided on the Institute's official website. Candidates should refer to the website for specific requirements.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be paid as per Pay Levels 1 to 14 of the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC), with specific levels varying based on the post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NITTTR Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting based on qualifications and experience, followed by a Written Test/Skill Test/Trade Test/Interview, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India norms. Additionally, further relaxation may be provided for persons engaged and having service at NITTTR Bhopal as per the Board of Governors' decision.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the NITTTR Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of NITTTR Bhopal on or before the last date. Ensure all details are filled correctly and required documents are uploaded.

faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NITTTR Bhopal Recruitment 2026 is 25th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.
